# UC-11.3.60 · Proofpoint TAP Impostor and BEC-Risk Message Scores

## Description

High impostor scores and Impostor-classified TAP messages surface business email compromise attempts that bypass traditional malware-focused rules.

## Value

Gives fraud and messaging teams a Splunk-native queue of BEC-like telemetry for account takeover response, executive protection, and vendor impersonation hunts.

## Implementation

Deploy the Proofpoint TAP Modular Input with SIEM (JSON) format. Confirm numeric `impostorScore` and `classification` fields extract at search time; use `spath` on `_raw` if your parser nests `threatsInfoMap`. Threshold impostor scores per organizational risk appetite. Join to HR lists for VIP recipients.

## SPL

```spl
index=email sourcetype="proofpoint_tap_siem" earliest=-24h
| eval imp=coalesce(impostorScore, ImpostorScore, 0)
| eval cls=coalesce(classification, Classification, "")
| where imp>=50 OR cls="Impostor"
| eval rcpt=mvindex(split(coalesce(recipient, Recipient, ""), ","), 0)
| stats latest(imp) as impostor_score values(cls) as classification values(subject) as subject by sender, rcpt
| sort -impostor_score
```

## Visualization

Table (sender × recipient × score), bar chart (top senders), timeline of events.

- [Proofpoint TAP Modular Input for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/3681)
